name: Trash Bin Medium - Brightroom™: Black Utility Storage Bin, 50% Recycled Plastic, 338.94 Volume, Hand Wash, 12" Height
description:
This Medium Trash Bin from Brightroom™ is a must-have accessory for your car. Made of plastic in a rectangular silhouette, this black trash bin has an open-top design with an indented front for easy collection and disposal of trash. Plus, it comes with buckled back straps to keep it securely hanging from the back of a car seat, letting you enjoy a tidy ride.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
